name: cypress-javascript-framework
description: Production-grade Cypress test automation framework — UI (Contact List App) + API (PokeAPI)

scripts.clean: rm -rf reports/*.json reports/*.html reports/screenshots reports/videos || true
scripts.test:ui:chunk1: CYPRESS_ENV=stage SPLIT=2 SPLIT_INDEX=0 npx cypress run --browser chrome --spec 'cypress/e2e/ui/**/*.cy.js'
scripts.test:ui:chunk2: CYPRESS_ENV=stage SPLIT=2 SPLIT_INDEX=1 npx cypress run --browser chrome --spec 'cypress/e2e/ui/**/*.cy.js'
scripts.test:ui:parallel: npx concurrently "npm run test:ui:chunk1" "npm run test:ui:chunk2"
scripts.report:generate: npx marge reports/merged-report.json --reportDir reports --reportFilename test-report --reportTitle 'Cypress Test Report' --reportPageTitle 'Cypress Test Report' --inline
scripts.report:all: npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:full: npm run test:staging && npm run report:all
